aiNotes.configuration.resolvedNoteAction: Action to take when a note is resolved. Affects the generated instructions for new # AI Notes sections. Existing instruction blocks are not mutated.
Delete the entire ## NOTE-XXX block from the document.
Move the ## NOTE-XXX block to a separate # AI Notes History section and mark it as resolved with ✅.
